community.body: ActivLife Hub connects organizers and participants who share a passion for getting out and doing more, together.

discover.headline: Find your next moment

mission.headline: The World Needs More Organizers
mission.subheadline: People create the best moments of real life. We help.
mission.body: Friendship, community, and celebration don't happen on their own — someone makes them happen. We exist to help more people become the organizers their communities need, and to turn that ability into a profession.

becomeOrganizer.headline: Turn bringing people together into a profession
becomeOrganizer.subheadline: A clear path from first lesson to first income — with the tools to look professional from day one.

ope.headline: Look professional from day one
ope.subheadline: Our planning engine turns a few details into a complete client proposal — timeline, plan, and budget — in minutes instead of hours.

onboarding.title: Start organizing — choose your path
onboarding.subtitle: A short, supportive path to start hosting activities with confidence.
onboarding.alreadySelected: You've selected the {path} path. Continue to payment when ready.

payment.title: Complete your certification payment
payment.subtitle: You selected the {path} path. Pay securely to unlock your certification.

beginner.title: New to Activity Organization
beginner.description: Start from scratch with a friendly course that walks you through everything you need to host great activities. The $99 is a one-time fee — it includes the course, the qualification exam, your ActivLife Organizer Certificate, and 30 days of Organizer Platform Access that begins when you successfully complete certification. After that, an active Organizer Platform subscription is required to keep publishing.
features: Module quizzes and a final exam
30 days of Organizer Platform access (starts at certification)

experienced.title: Already an Activity Organizer
experienced.description: Skip the course and prove your expertise with a timed qualification test. The $29 is a one-time certification fee — it includes the qualification test, your ActivLife Organizer Certificate, and 30 days of Organizer Platform Access that begins when you successfully complete certification. After that, an active Organizer Platform subscription is required to keep publishing.
features: 30 days of Organizer Platform access (starts at certification)

items.a: Choose a path, complete the Academy course or qualification test, and earn your Certified Organizer certificate.

Once you complete certification, you get 30 days of Organizer Platform access included. After that, an active Organizer Platform subscription is required to keep listing activities and accepting bookings.
Pick the path below that matches your experience, then continue to payment when you are ready.

onboarding.confidence: You are joining a platform built on certified organizers, secure payments, and clear community standards.
onboarding.flowNote: Choose your organizer path below. Beginner — learn the basics and get certified. Experienced — prove your skills with a short qualification test. After payment, your course or test unlocks automatically.

notCertified.description: Complete your certification before activating your subscription.

meta.title: For Organizers
meta.description: ActivLife Hub is the platform for activity organizers — run your events and automate the manual work, all in one place.

hero.title: The platform built for activity organizers
hero.subtitle: ActivLife Hub helps you run your events and automates the manual work — planning, bookings, payments, reviews and more, all in one place.

tools.headline: Stop jumping between 10 different tools
tools.body: Today many organizers use a different app for every task — and move information between them by hand:
tools.conclusion: ActivLife Hub helps you organize this work in one place.

today.headline: What ActivLife Hub helps automate today
today.subheadline: Everything below already works on the platform.

items.title: Activities & venues
items.body: Create and manage your activities and venues from one dashboard.

items.title: Marketplace listings
items.body: Get discovered by participants searching for activities near them.

items.title: Requests & client proposals
items.body: Receive client requests and send professional proposals to win the work.

items.title: Bookings & registration
items.body: Accept bookings and manage participant registration in one place.

items.title: Payments & refunds
items.body: Take secure payments and issue refunds through Stripe — no separate setup.

items.title: Reviews
items.body: Collect reviews from participants to build trust and win repeat business.

items.title: Calendar & clients
items.body: Keep your schedule and client list organized as you grow.

items.title: Notifications
items.body: Stay on top of new requests, bookings and updates with in-app notifications.

items.title: Organizer dashboard
items.body: Run your whole organizing workflow — and track how it performs — in one place.

items.title: Push notifications for participants
items.body: Reach participants directly with event updates and reminders.

items.title: Email campaigns
items.body: Send announcements and follow-ups to your audience.

items.title: Social media publishing
items.body: Publish your activities to social channels from one place.

items.title: Telegram integration
items.body: Connect your Telegram audience to your activities.

items.title: WhatsApp integration
items.body: Reach participants on WhatsApp without leaving the platform.

items.title: AI marketing assistant
items.body: Get help writing posts, descriptions and campaigns.

why.headline: Why organizers join ActivLife Hub
items: A repeatable process for every event
Less time in spreadsheets and chats

learn.headline: Get certified and learn the craft
learn.body: New organizers start in the Academy — a guided course or experienced fast-track — and earn the Certified Organizer credential that clients trust. Certification stays part of your pathway, not the whole story.

pricing.headline: What it costs
pricing.body: The Academy and certification are paid programs, and operating as an organizer is a paid subscription. See what each part costs.

cta.headline: Ready to run your events in one place?
cta.body: Get certified, set up your dashboard, and let ActivLife Hub handle the manual work.

ope.headline: Plan every event in minutes with OPE
ope.subheadline: OPE — the Organizer Planning Engine — turns a small set of event details into a complete, professional plan.

items.title: Event plans
items.body: A clear, structured plan for the whole event from just a few inputs.

items.title: Timelines
items.body: A run-of-show timeline so every moment is accounted for.

items.title: Budgets
items.body: A realistic budget breakdown you can share and adjust.

items.title: Client proposals
items.body: A polished proposal ready to send and win the booking.

ope.note: OPE is in early access and rolling out gradually — not every capability is publicly available yet.

meta.title: Organizer Philosophy
meta.description: What it means to be an ActivLife Hub Organizer.

intro.headline: What it means to be an ActivLife Hub Organizer
intro.lead: Great organizers prevent problems before they happen. Being an ActivLife Hub Organizer is less about reacting brilliantly in a crisis and more about quietly making sure one never arrives — and that everyone in your care feels looked after.

organizerPhilosophy.closing: People create the best moments of real life. We help.

principles.title: Why Organizers Matter
principles.body: Communities, friendships and celebrations exist because someone makes them happen.

principles.title: Organizer Comes First
principles.body: Guests see the activity; the organizer sees the responsibility.

principles.title: People Before Activities
principles.body: Activities exist for people, not people for activities.

principles.title: Prevention Over Recovery
principles.body: The best organizer prevents problems rather than saving the day.

principles.title: Promise Only What You Can Deliver
principles.body: Trust is built through reliability, not ambition.

principles.title: Respect People's Time
principles.body: Start on time, communicate clearly, plan reliably.

principles.title: Safety Is Not Optional
principles.body: When it involves children, sports, water, the outdoors or transport, the duty of care comes first.

principles.title: Organizers Create Trust
principles.body: Every event affects trust in every organizer on the platform.

principles.title: The ActivLife Hub Organizer
principles.body: Not a flawless performer — a trustworthy one.

hero.title: The Organizer Academy
hero.subtitle: Learn the craft, earn the credential, and become a Certified Organizer — two ways in, one recognized standard.

paths.headline: Two ways in
paths.beginnerBody: New to organizing? Learn it step by step.
paths.fastBody: Already experienced? Prove it with the skills test.

curriculum.headline: What you'll learn
curriculum.subheadline: Eight modules from first principles to your first paid event.

modules.title: Safety & Responsibility
modules.desc: Risk, duty of care and prevention. Mandatory.

modules.title: Building an Organizer Career
modules.desc: First client, first event, first income.

certification.headline: Certification
certification.body: Pass a knowledge exam and a practical demonstration to earn the Certified Organizer credential — proof clients can verify.

badges.headline: Verified vs Certified
badges.certifiedBody: Proof of skill — you can plan and deliver safely and reliably.
badges.verifiedBody: Proof of identity — a real, accountable organizer. Stackable with Certified.

mastery.headline: Mastery-based, not pass-or-fail
mastery.body: The exam exists to help you reach the standard, not to eliminate you. Retakes are encouraged, mistakes teach, and safety competency is mandatory. Certification confirms you have reached the standard.

philosophy.headline: Built on the Organizer Philosophy
philosophy.body: Prevention over recovery. Safety first. People before activities. The Academy builds the character of a trustworthy organizer, not just the mechanics.

cta.headline: Start your certification
cta.body: Begin the path to becoming a Certified Organizer.

meta.title: Activity Planner — Early Access
meta.description: Plan your event in minutes. Early access — $9.99 one-time.

hero.title: Activity Planner is opening for early access
hero.subtitle: Go from 'I want to organize something' to a complete, ready-to-use plan in minutes.

whatItDoes.headline: What the Planner does
items: Asks you a few quick questions about your event
Builds a complete plan tailored to you
Helps you pull it off — on time and on budget

receive.headline: What you'll receive
items: A clear checklist & timeline (before, day-of, after)
Everything you'll need, sized to your guest count

items.title: Kids Birthday Party
items.line: Theme, games, allergy-safe food, and a stress-free timeline.

items.title: BBQ / Family Picnic
items.line: Permits, grilling logistics, veg options, and a rain backup.

items.title: Community Meetup
items.line: Welcoming setup, multilingual details, kids' corner, accessibility.

benefits.headline: Why people love it
items: Hours of planning, done in minutes
Know what it'll cost before you start
A safety net: hand it to a pro anytime

cta.headline: Be the first to try it
cta.body: Join the waitlist and we'll let you know the moment the Activity Planner is live.
